data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies interface choices to reduce decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Uses design patterns that limit options and streamline navigation.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements are optimized for ease of accessibility.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements are sized and spaced to reduce target acquisition time.

data.title: Pareto Principle
data.description: Focuses on features that benefit the majority of users.
data.technical_spec: 80/20 rule applied to prioritize user-experienced features.

data.title: Jakob's Law of Internet User Experience
data.description: Design consistency across interfaces to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Conforms to common web design practices to minimize user confusion.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: An aesthetically pleasing interface is perceived as easier to use.
data.technical_spec: Emphasizes visual design to enhance overall usability perception.
